Task: Deploy the approved v13 DinoBrain Observatory deterministic fossil graph design: commit visual c
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Deployed DinoBrain Observatory v13 deterministic fossil graph design. Bumped package and installer version to 0.1.7, verified build/hook/OS/installer alignment, pushed main, added a GitHub Actions Windows release workflow, retagged v0.1.7 to the workflow commit, and confirmed the GitHub Release contains DinoBrainSetup.zip and DinoBrainSetup.zip.sha256 assets.

items.title: Task: Generate hyperpersonalized Codex suggestions for work to do next in the local dinobrain project,
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Generated project-specific Codex suggestions by combining DinoBrain context, local git branch state, current main/tag state, GitHub PR activity, and available connector signals. Strong candidates centered on an unmerged observatory branch and a fresh hook-fix PR that is still open against an older main.

items.title: Task: Redesign DinoBrain Observatory graph v14 so information readability takes priority over forced d
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Redesigned DinoBrain Observatory graph v14 to prioritize semantic readability over forced dinosaur silhouette. Replaced deterministic dino-slot layout with hub-based clusters, softened default edges, moved the fossil scaffold into the background, reduced default long labels, updated design QA notes, verified build and Observatory rendering, and captured the latest local screensh

items.title: Task: Improve the DinoBrain Observatory dinosaur graph design after user feedback that the deployed v0
items.summary: status=partial | project=dinobrain | Improved the DinoBrain Observatory dinosaur graph candidate after user feedback that the previous deployed visual felt disappointing. Kept changes visual-only: increased graph canvas height, added aspect-preserving dino frame mapping, redistributed root/category nodes into head/neck/tail/leg roles, strengthened pose lock, reduced edge physics, and added live-data scaffold routes.

items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Took the DinoBrain Observatory dinosaur graph one step further after the v7 candidate. Implemented deterministic fossil mode with locked node poses, explicit slot arrays for silhouette parts, redistributed live node types across body/tail/neck/head/leg roles, reduced background edge prominence, added fixed canvas guide routes for the fossil scaffold, tuned head/neck proportions,

items.summary: status=completed | project=<machine-local-path> | Generated one strong DinoBrain suggestion based on fresh local git and GitHub evidence. The only candidate that clearly passed the why-user/why-now/why-Codex/not-already-handled bar was landing PR #1, because the hook-fix branch is still open from 2026-07-03 while main advanced to v0.1.7 without it.
